author: rooyca
description: Request and retrieve data from APIs. The responses are delivered in a JSON format for easy integration with your notes.

manifest.author: rooyca
manifest.description: Integrate API data into your notes with request caching, variable support, and precise JSON extraction.
manifest.name: APIRequest

name: APIRequest

* build(deps): bump sanitize-html from 2.17.2 to 2.17.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/pull/71
* build(deps): bump urllib3 from 2.6.3 to 2.7.0 in /docs by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/pull/73
* build(deps): bump postcss from 8.5.8 to 8.5.14 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/pull/74
* build(deps): bump idna from 3.10 to 3.15 in /docs by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/pull/75
* build(deps): bump pymdown-extensions from 10.16.1 to 10.21.3 in /docs by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/pull/76
* build(deps): bump sanitize-html from 2.17.3 to 2.17.4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/pull/77
* build(deps-dev): bump esbuild from 0.25.0 to 0.28.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/pull/78
* build(deps-dev): bump js-yaml from 4.1.1 to 4.3.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/pull/79


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/2.1.0...2.1.1

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:
## Changelog

### New Features
* **Interactive Status Bar** (#59, #24): Redesigned status bar now shows the number of API requests and provides a clickable menu to view, navigate, and identify active (green) vs. disabled (gray) requests in your document

### Settings
* Added options to customize status bar colors and toggle the feature on/off

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/2.0.6...2.0.7

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:
## Changelogs
* re-implementation of `res-type` as fallback
* clean up the code a little bit

## Features
* now is possible to declare global values in the settings. Those values can be used on all files using this syntax `{{KEY}}`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.3.6...1.3.7

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:
## Changelogs
* fixed some bugs
* added usecases to the docs

## Features

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.3.5...1.3.6

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:
## Changelogs
* **fixed:** list of numbers on front-matter was rendering as numbers and not strings (It seems that Obsidian doesn't like numerical lists) See https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/issues/24#issuecomment-2175950351
* **fixed:** nested arrays like `result -> {..} -> id` weren't rendering

## Features
* **added:** internal links can be set in the properties (e.g. `properties: [[ip]]`) See https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/issues/24#issuecomment-2175963159
* **added:** '{{this.file.name}}' and other functions can be used with `show` flag. #27 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.3.4...1.3.5

---

Thanks to @elvarb for the feedback.

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.3.2...1.3.3

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:
## Features
* added the flag `properties` to save part of the response in the frontmatter (this needs two things to work: a JSON response and the `show` flag) [DOCS](https://rooyca.github.io/obsidian-api-request/en/codeblocks#properties)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.3.1...1.3.2

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:

* Spanish translation for README and DOCS
* build(deps-dev): bump braces from 3.0.2 to 3.0.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/pull/23

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.3.0...1.3.1

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:
## Changelogs

- The variable `{{this.file.name}}` gets the current filename. (It can be used on: `url`, `body` & `headers`)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.2.9...1.3.0

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:
## Changelog 

- Removed spaces from code-block flags (it should work either with or without spaces after the colon, e.x. `url: http://...` or `url:http://...`). Solve #21 
- Generalized response types. There are just two: `json` and `other`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.2.8...1.2.9

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:
## Changes

- *Improved* the styles in settings

## Features(?) 

- Added the option to remove the responses in the `localStorage` one by one, not all at ones

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.2.7...1.2.8

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:
## Changes
- **Update GIFS**
- **Update README**: Aiming to move the `Usage` section entirely to the docs page
- **Update plugins description**: I believe the use case of the plugin is more widely open now, not just for apis but for http requests in general.

## New Features
- **Save response to file**: If need it responses can be saved to files using the flag `save-to` in the code-block

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.2.6...1.2.7

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:
## Changes
- **URL Validation:** Enhanced URL validation to ensure all URLs start with "https://". The protocol is automatically added if not present.
- **Improved JSON Display:** Reformatted JSON output for a cleaner and more readable presentation when no `show` flag  is provided.
- **innerHTML Replacement:** Replaced instances of `innerHTML` with safer alternatives, except for three essential cases where `innerHTML` is necessary to render HTML content.

## New Features
- **Repetitive Request Execution:** Introduced a new flag `req-repeat` to enable the execution of requests multiple times. Example usage: `req-repeat: 20t@10s` (20 times at 10-second intervals).
- **Conditional Notifications:** Added functionality to display notifications based on specific response conditions. Example usage: `notify-if: rateUsd > 500`.



**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.2.5...1.2.6

releases.author: Rooyca
releases.description:
A very brief summary would be that this release sought to improve the readability of both the code and the documentation. 

- Functions move to a separate file
- Regex variables move to separate file
- Removing unnecessary lines of code
- Added multiple comments

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.2.4...1.2.5

- We now use `req` instead of `apir`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Rooyca/obsidian-api-request/compare/1.0.4...1.1.0
